explainability.findings: A privacy policy outlines user rights to request information regarding the criteria and procedures utilized in automated decision-making processes.
explainability.path_to_improvement: Publish user-facing explanation interfaces or documented appeal workflows.

relevant_sources.summary: The Masco Group Privacy Policy document provides evidence for the **explainability** and **oversight** pillars of responsible AI. This policy document outlines user rights to request information about the criteria and procedures used in automated decision-making, supporting explainability. Furthermore, it details the right to request a review of decisions made solely through automated processing, demonstrating a commitment to oversight.
relevant_sources.title: Masco Group Privacy Policy

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: A press release highlights a vendor selection process for AI solutions. This process references due diligence and accountability in partnership decisions.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports governance by highlighting a vendor selection process for AI solutions, indicating due diligence and accountability in partnership decisions. The press release also demonstrates transparency by describing the development and purpose of the ChatHUE AI tool, explaining its use case, function, and the specific AI capabilities and tools employed.
relevant_sources.title: Behr Paint AI Color Selection with Google Cloud

oversight.findings: A privacy policy details user rights to request a review of decisions that are made solely through automated processing.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

relevant_sources.summary: The Masco Group Privacy Policy document provides evidence for the **explainability** and **oversight** pillars of responsible AI. This policy document outlines user rights to request information about the criteria and procedures used in automated decision-making, supporting explainability. Furthermore, it details the right to request a review of decisions made solely through automated processing, demonstrating a commitment to oversight.
relevant_sources.title: Masco Group Privacy Policy

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: A job posting outlines responsibilities for enforcing governance guardrails, responsible AI practices, and internal frameworks for AI governance and accountability, including "human-in-loop" procedures and bias mitigation. Additionally, a press release describes the development, purpose, use case, function, and specific AI capabilities and tools employed for the ChatHUE AI tool.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: This AI Agent Developer job posting provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. The job description explicitly mentions responsibilities related to enforcing governance guardrails and responsible AI practices, including implementing "human-in-loop" procedures and bias mitigation. This indicates the company's commitment to transparency by outlining internal frameworks for AI governance and accountability.
relevant_sources.title: AI Agent Developer Job Posting

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports governance by highlighting a vendor selection process for AI solutions, indicating due diligence and accountability in partnership decisions. The press release also demonstrates transparency by describing the development and purpose of the ChatHUE AI tool, explaining its use case, function, and the specific AI capabilities and tools employed.
relevant_sources.title: Behr Paint AI Color Selection with Google Cloud

summary.overall_findings: Masco's privacy policy outlines user rights to request information about the criteria and procedures used in automated decision-making. This policy-level documentation contributes to the 3 of 7 responsible AI pillars for which evidence was found, alongside disclosures for oversight and governance. For instance, published materials highlight a vendor selection process for AI solutions and reference due diligence in AI partnership decisions, drawing from 4 publicly available sources. No qualifying public evidence was found for transparency, fairness, and 2 additional pillars.
